title: Dongosolo la Agenti
attention: Pulogalamu iyi ya agenti siyengokila pa "anzake" kapena "makasitomala." Chonde werengani {faqLink} musanatsogolere.
earnPerSale: Pezani {amount} pa kugulitsa kwa kasitomala watsopano!
earnDescription: Mwa kuika ulalo ku InterServer pa tsamba lanu, mudzapeza {amount} ya komisho pa kugulitsa kulikonse kwa katsopano komwe kumachokera pa ulalo pa tsamba lanu.
shareUrl: Gawanani URL yanu ya agenti ndi abwenzi

status.title: Mkhalidwe
status.defaultDesc: Kasitomala walembetsedwa pa agenti koma sanakwaniritse zofunikira.
status.pendingDesc: Kasitomala wakwaniritse zofunikira zanthawi ndi zolipira, ndipo akuyembekezera kutsimikizidwa ndi woyang'anira.
status.failedDesc: Kasitomala sanakwaniritse zofunikira kapena agenti anaphwanya malamulo pakuponya kasitomala.
status.lockedDesc: Akaunti ya kasitomala yatsekeredwa ndipo si yabwino.
status.paidDesc: Agenti walipidwa kale pa kulembetsa kwa kasitomala uyu.

paymentSetup.title: Kakhazikitsidwe ka Kulipira
paymentSetup.choosePayment: Sankhani chomwe mukufuna kuchitidwa ndi malipiro anu a agenti
paymentSetup.createPrepay: Pangani Malipiro Atsogolo ndi ndalama kuti agwiritsidwe ntchito mwachiyambi pa mafatura anga.

webTrafficPage.title: Kusamuka Kwatsopano kwa Intaneti
webTrafficPage.noTraffic: Palibe kusamuka kwatsopano kwa agenti kumene kukugwirizana ndi kusaka
webTrafficPage.loadInNewTab: Tsegulani tsamba mu tab yatsopano (samalani za ma cookie omwe akhazikitsidwa)
webTrafficPage.viewInNewTab: Onani Tsamba mu Tab Yatsopano (samalani za ma cookie omwe akhazikitsidwa)

viewBanner.title: Onani Chithunzi
viewBanner.sidPlaceholder: mwachitsanzo, Tsamba Lalikulu, Mndandanda wa Makalata

viewBanners.title: Zithunzi
viewBanners.bannerNote: Kuti mudziwe zambiri za chithunzi monga khodi ya HTML, kukula kwa chithunzi, ndi zina, dinani pa chithunzi chilichonse chomwe mukufuna kugwiritsa ntchito pa tsamba lanu.
viewBanners.vpsWithTracking: Tsamba la VPS ndi Mawu Otsatira

dockSetup.title: Kakhazikitsidwe ka Dock
dockSetup.landingPageSetup: Kakhazikitsidwe ka Tsamba Lolandirira la Agenti
dockSetup.couponTooltip: Kasitomala watsopano akagwiritsa ntchito kuponi iyi, adzalemba kuti watumizidwa ndinuwo ndipo adzalemba ngati kugulitsa kwa agenti.
dockSetup.descriptionPlaceholder: Gwiritsani ntchito kuponi iyi mukaika dongosolo kuti mulandire mwezi woyamba wa kusunga wa 1 penny chabe.

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.a1: Timapereka $100 komisho yosinthika pa kugulitsa, ndipo ichi ndi chimodzi mwa mapulogalamu a agenti omwe amalipira bwino kwambiri.
faqPage.q2: 2. Nthawi yayimalira kuti kugulitsa kuonekere pa akaunti yanga?
faqPage.a3_step2: Kumanzere kumapeto mudzaona njira ya Onani Tsamba la Agenti.
faqPage.a3_step3: Apa mudzaona akomisho anu onse odikira ndi owonjezereka.
faqPage.q4: 4. Ndikudziwa wina amene akufuna kusunga. Ndizipeza bwanji ndalama ya kutumiza?
faqPage.a4_step2: Tokozerani mpaka pansi kuti muone ulalo wanu wa agenti.
faqPage.a4_step3: Tumizani ulalo uwu kwa wachizungu wanu amene akufuna kusunga.
faqPage.a4_step4: Akadinani ulalo uwo naika akaunti nafe, mudzapeza komisho.
faqPage.q5: 5. Ndawolozedwa pulogalamu ya InterServer Hosting ya agenti. Ndichite chiyani?
faqPage.a5_step1: Lowani ku akaunti yanu ya agenti kuti mufike zithunzi za InterServer mwa kudina tab ya Zithunzi ndi Maulalo.
faqPage.a5_step2: Sankhani zithunzi za zamalonda zomwe mukufuna kuwonjezera pa tsamba lanu.
faqPage.a5_step3: Mudzaona makhodi a zithunzi kumanzere kwa zithunzi zonse; kopiyani ndi kukabika khodi pa tsamba lanu.
faqPage.a5_step4: Wina akadina ulalo uwo nagonula akaunti ya kusunga, mudzapeza komisho.
faqPage.q6: 6. Ndingathe kubetcha PPC kuti ndisangalatse InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Inde, koma chonde musabetche dzina lathu la kampani, masintha a dzina lathu la kampani, masolotchero, kapena mawu aliwonse omwe ali ndi gawo lake kuphatikiza InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Konzekerani pa mabetcha a mawu monga kusunga mwachangu, kusunga PHP, kusunga WordPress.
faqPage.a6_line3: Chonde tilankhuleni ngati mukufuna thandizo pokumbukira mawu.
faqPage.a6_line4: Onetsetsani kuwonjezera InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting ngati mawu oipa a kampeni.
faqPage.a7_line1: Pambuyo pa masiku 90 kugulitsa koona kudzasintha mkhalidwe wochokera wamba kupita ku Dikira.
faqPage.a7_line2: Kugulitsa kukadikira kulipidwa mu masiku 7 oyamba a mwezi.
faqPage.q8: 8. Ndili ndi kugulitsa kodikira komwe sikulipidwa.
faqPage.a8_line1: Pakhoza kukhala ndi zifukwa zingapo. Nthawi zina timafunika nthawi yowonjezera kutsimikizira kugulitsa.
faqPage.a8_line2: Chinthu china chosavuta kusanthula ndikoneneza kuti njira yanu ya kulipira yakhazikitsidwa.
faqPage.q9: 9. Kugulitsa/akomisho anga akakhala odikira mpaka kalembedwa?
faqPage.q10: 10. Ndingagwiritsa ntchito ulalo wanga wa agenti pakuzitumiza pa akaunti zomwe ndidzagwiritsa ntchito pa zosangalatsa?
faqPage.a10: Ayi. Kulumikizana kulikonse ndi akaunti yokhudza kugulitsa kumadzakhala cholephera choyambirira cha kugulitsa.
faqPage.a11_intro: Kukana kumatanthauza kuti komisho yalephera kwamuyaya.
faqPage.a11_reason2: Njira yomweyo ya kulipira inagwiritsidwa ntchito ngati akaunti ina.
faqPage.a11_reason3: Dongosolo linazindikira kuti inu, agenti, mwalinso kugwiritsa ntchito akaunti ya kasitomala.
faqPage.a11_policy: Popeza malipiro athu a $100 pa kugulitsa nthawi zambiri ndi ochuluka kwambiri kuposa zomwe timabweza kuchokera kwa kasitomala ngakhale pambuyo pa chaka 1, tili ndi ndondomeko yokhazika yolandirira zotumizidwa zomwe sizikukwaniritse mwongozo wathu. Mukatumiza bwenzi kapena kasitomala, aperekani ulalo kapena kuponi chabe. Musagawane mitundu ya malipiro ndipo musagwiritsa ntchito akaunti.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Onaninso malamulo athu a agenti apa:
faqPage.q12: 12. Ndine wopanga/wokonza ndipo ndidzatumiza makasitomala. Ndizi bwino?
faqPage.a12_line1: Dongosolo ili silizagwira ntchito nafe (kapena pulogalamu iliyonse ya agenti wa kusunga). Makalambule akachitika pa akaunti zinayi, akomisho amalephera.
faqPage.a12_line2: Izi zimachitika kuzuza munthu mmodzi kulembetsa ndi kupeza ndalama pa pulogalamu yathu ya agenti mwa kuzitumiza.
faqPage.a12_line3: Mungafike kuyika makasitomala mwamwiniwake ndi kuwabilila nokha pogwiritsa ntchito zinthu monga PayPal. Mutha kugula akaunti ya reseller ya kusunga kuchokera kwa ife ndikuyamba.

tosPage.title: Malamulo a Utumiki
tosPage.welcome: Takulandirani ku Pulogalamu ya Agenti ya InterServer
